output.summary: Combines ResFormer-style value residual blending, DenseFormer DWA mixing, and legal test-time training on scored validation windows.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Fine-tunes on already-scored validation windows via test-time training during sliding-window eval.
techniques: Value residual mixes first-layer V into later layers without extra params
DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging generalizes U-Net skip connections
Test-time training fine-tunes on scored validation windows via AdamW
